transcript.text: This video is What I Think About Racism. Racism is kind of an ambiguous term, so I will define what racism is for me before I continue.

Firstly, I think that racism is the belief that your race, it's usually the white people who are racist, so let's say that white people are genetically superior to all of the other races, and that causes you to change how you treat those races, because you think that they're just forever inferior.
And if you were to allow, say, black people to come up in the world and be as powerful as the white people, and as numerous as the white people, then America will become like Africa.
That's what I consider racism to be. I think racism, I am not a racist, I do not believe that white people are genetically superior to black people.

I think we, I think Europe is more peaceful and more advanced than Africa, because we lived in a harsher climate, so we had to invent stuff, and then we had these civilizations, the empires that brought everybody together, meanwhile the Africans are down there just living it up.
That, you know, they get hungry or they pick a banana off the tree, you know, this kind of a thing.
So, some people might think, oh, well then white people are 50,000 years more advanced in intelligence than black people, because we've been using our brains for so much longer.
Well, I think that's more of a cultural thing, culturally, we just keep building off and building off of each other and growing and growing, and it's not all about the genetics.

I think knowledge is actually ingrained in everything around you, and the land, you go to a land, and you can actually gain wisdom off of the rocks, the wisdom that has been put into the rocks for you, and the air, and everything.
And, um, it just takes a long time.
Um, so do I think, obviously, there are different genetic traits between the races, in the physical, so why not in the brain also?
Um, I'm thinking, yes, there are definitely some traits.
Black people like to rhyme, I'm thinking that's definitely, uh, genetic.
Uh, white people like to plot, perhaps that's genetic.
So, you could say yes, white people are genetically superior to black people, when it comes to inventing gadgets, gadgetry.
But, maybe that can make you insane, and make you plot way too much, when what you really should be doing is, um, is, um, is being a communicator.
Like what black people are really good at.
So, black people are more intelligent communicators, white people are more intelligent at concentrating on numbers.
Who knows? Maybe not.
I'm not totally sure about that.
But, one thing that I think is very important is, you should not become upset with somebody for being a racist, and think that they're just crazy.
Because everybody has reasons to believe what they believe.
And if you do that, you'll just cause people to be closet racists.
And then they'll, they'll create secrecy.
And they'll, people will lie, and people will, uh, lie about that, so they'll lie about other things, and then they'll just be liars.
So, do not jump all over somebody if they think, if they think, if they are racist, just talk it out with them.
Explain to them that it's not the case.
And also, that mutts are more intelligent than purebreds.
What happens when you mix races?
Everybody knows this, all of the geneticists know this, that if you mate a brother and a sister together, or cousins together,
The offspring come out fucked up, retarded, well, I think it's the same way, in a certain respect, when you breed certain races together.
They don't come out retarded, they come out great, but they come out too much of what that race is.
Because, in this world, that is a global world, we should be embracing all of the genetic traits of all the races.
Um, I think the Indians are more psychic, they can communicate with the land better.
The Asians, genetically, are more cooperative, they can, they're more psychic with each other.
White people love their numbers and their gadgetry.
The aboriginals, the aboriginals are definitely amazing people.
They're very kind and they have visions and I've heard stories of them telepathically communicating with each other from hundreds of miles away.
So, they definitely have some super, super powers that we don't.
They have an extra chromosome too, by the way.
They're almost like aliens.
So, I think people who are mixtures of two different races may have an upper hand against everybody else.
Um, like Mariah Carey.
Maybe she could communicate and come up with rhymes, but also do math.
I don't know.
I'm not saying that, well, black people do not as well as SATs, but I think that's just a cultural thing.
Their schools just aren't as, don't have as big of budgets and they just can't, they're not hanging in there because of that.
But, uh, you don't need to explain to me that there's lots of intelligent black people who could do math around me.
I'm just generalizing here.
It's okay to generalize.
Um, so I think the mutts, mutts are the smartest.

Uh, allowing a belief about somebody to affect how you treat them is not fair.
